extensionDescription.message: Kho cov ntawv Arabic typography tshaj lij rau txhua lub vev xaib. Kho cov ntawv sib nrug (letter-spacing), txhaj cov ntawv zoo nkauj Arabic, thiab kho cov teeb meem rendering uas ua rau cov ntawv Arabic tawg.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Qhib lossis kaw Arabic Type extension

fontSizeLabel.message: Qhov Ntsuas Loj ntawm Tsab Ntawv

letterSpacingNote.message: Cov ntawv sib nrug yog ib txwm teem rau 0 los tiv thaiv cov ntawv Arabic kev sib cais. Qhov no yog feem ntau ua rau cov ntawv Arabic tawg nyob rau hauv lub vev xaib.

forceRTLLabel.message: Yuam Txoj Kev Sab Xis-mus-Sab Laug

forceRTLDescription.message: Yuam txoj kev sab xis-mus-sab laug rau cov thaiv ntawv Arabic. Qhib rau cov vev xaib uas Arabic tshwm sim yuam kev sab laug-mus-sab xis.

diacriticsDescription.message: Txhim kho cov ntawv rendering ntawm cov cim suab Arabic (tashkeel) los tiv thaiv kev txiav saum toj thiab hauv qab kab ntawv.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Cov ntawv thov raug xa mus rau Google cov servers. Saib fonts.google.com/privacy.
